purpose: Goal-oriented architecture map for integrating existing Society Builder, assessment, role-fit, container, trust-board, governance, and mutual-aid systems into a unified intelligence layer.

static_to_live_replacements.src/data/memberBehavioralProfiles.js: Replace in production role review with live behavioral profile adapter from Garvey, MemberProfile, SocietyInstitutionalProfile, and First Ten evidence.
static_to_live_replacements.src/pages/MutualAidRoleReviewPage.jsx: Convert to live Society Builder role review or deprecate after /societies/:societyId/role-assignment exists.
static_to_live_replacements.src/data/roleInterpretationEngine.js: Reuse language/rules, but live interpretation should write SocietyRoleCandidateReview.
static_to_live_replacements.src/data/mutualAidRoleBlueprints.js: Keep as canonical seed data until backend blueprint catalog or migration exists.

pre_adaptive_kanban_required_work: Expose persisted role assignment via frontend API client.
Add live Society Builder role assignment UI.
Seed role openings from existing role blueprints.
Create live behavioral profile adapter from existing evidence sources.
Map Garvey assessment completions to role blueprint recommended assessments.
Surface role coverage on Society Home.
Annotate Trust Board tasks with linked-role coverage without changing current Kanban behavior.
Add privacy, consent, and permission checks for assessment-derived evidence.
deferred: Passport, badges, reputation, or negative scores
Full Care Teams and private needs workflow

phase_roadmap.name: Wire persisted role assignment into frontend Society Builder
Seed role openings from Role Blueprint Library
Connect Garvey evidence to role interpretation
Connect role interpretation to First Ten and role openings
Connect role coverage to Trust Board and 100-Day Container
Build later operating modules after the intelligence spine works
